tradeIdeas.title: Long Brent Crude / Long ASEAN Energy Producers
tradeIdeas.rationale: Brent confirmed $111.16 Apr 28 (+2.71%, TradingEconomics); market raised risk premium despite Rubio rejection - D57 est. ~$102 was wrong. May 1 War Powers deadline: congressional constraint risk on Trump; Iran 'still in war situation'. Mine-clearing ~6 months (PBS) - Hormuz physical reopening delayed even on deal. Tail (45%) + Stress (45%) = 90% continued disruption. Stop-loss: confirmed deal + mine clearance + P&I restoration (Brent sub-$92). Conviction medium.

tradeIdeas.title: Rebuild ASEAN Energy Long / Underweight ASEAN Banks
tradeIdeas.rationale: Brent confirmed $111.16 Apr 28 (+2.71%, TradingEconomics); ASEAN Energy Equities ~147.0 est. (-1.2%); ASEAN Banks ~173.5 est. (+0.3%). iTraxx Asia IG ~200bp (-2bp est.); ASEAN HY ~588bp (-2bp est.). GCC summit Jeddah (Apr 28) mildly positive; May 1 War Powers deadline adds political uncertainty. ASEAN Energy long supported at $111 Brent; ASEAN Banks underweight narrowing as GCC stability signal improves. Tail (45%) points to $130+ Brent and 230-260bp iTraxx. Conviction medium on both legs.

tradeIdeas.title: PHP Short - Hold on Talks Collapse
tradeIdeas.rationale: USD/PHP ~58.70 est. (-0.03% Apr 29). GCC summit Jeddah (Apr 28) mildly positive for EM FX; May 1 War Powers deadline adds political uncertainty; tail risk 45% unchanged. Blockade intact; Iran holds 3 Western vessels; full PHP recovery still capped - nuclear stalemate unresolved. USD Call/PHP Put 61.00 overlay retains tail hedge value. Stop-loss: confirmed full Hormuz reopening with P&I restoration below 58.00. Conviction low.

tradeIdeas.title: IDR Short - Hold on Re-Escalation
tradeIdeas.rationale: USD/IDR ~17,140 est. (-0.06% Apr 29); Indonesia 10Y ~7.35% est. (+3bp). Brent confirmed $111.16 Apr 28 - ICP overshoot ~$41/bbl, severe fiscal pressure intensifies. GCC summit Jeddah (Apr 28) mildly positive; May 1 War Powers deadline; tail risk 45% unchanged. Hold IDR short at half-size; fiscal strain and nuclear stalemate keep risk elevated. Stop-loss at USD/IDR 16,600 (confirmed Hormuz reopening). Conviction low.

tradeIdeas.title: iTraxx Asia IG CDS Protection - Hold at 210bp
tradeIdeas.rationale: iTraxx Asia IG ~200bp (-2bp Apr 29 est.); ASEAN HY ~588bp (-2bp est.). GCC summit Jeddah (Apr 28) provides mild spread relief; May 1 War Powers deadline adds political risk. Tail risk 45% unchanged - mine-clearing ~6 months even post-deal (PBS); full Hormuz commercial reopening delayed. Hold CDS protection at trimmed size; tail (45%) targets iTraxx 230-260bp; stress (45%) stabilises 195-215bp. Remove at confirmed deal + mine clearance + spreads below 175bp. Conviction medium.
instruments: Sapura Energy / Hyflux bond short via CDS

tradeIdeas.title: Long JKM LNG vs Short TTF - Hold on Talks Collapse
tradeIdeas.rationale: JKM last confirmed $16.56 Apr 27 (TradingEconomics, +0.03%); TTF confirmed €44.31 Apr 28 (-0.8%, TradingEconomics). GCC summit Jeddah (Apr 28) mildly positive for LNG outlook; May 1 War Powers deadline adds political dimension. Physical situation unchanged - Ras Laffan restart not before late Aug 2026; mine-clearing ~6 months regardless of deal (PBS). Hold JKM long; nuclear stalemate maintains structural premium. Stress target $18-22 JKM; tail target $26-30. Stop at confirmed mine clearance + P&I restoration. Conviction medium.
instruments: Asia LNG spot cargo purchase via intermediary

cfTriggers.description: iTraxx Asia IG ~200bp (-2bp Apr 29 est.) - GCC summit Jeddah (Apr 28) marginal spread relief; May 1 War Powers deadline adds uncertainty; spreads remain distressed at 200bp vs pre-crisis 106bp. Execute any residual private placements. Tail (45%) still targets 230-260bp. Window remains narrow - Hormuz reopening delayed 6 months regardless of deal.

Brent confirmed $111.16 Apr 28 (+2.71%, TradingEconomics); THB ~33.97 est. (-0.06%); Thailand 10Y ~2.40% est. (+2bp). GCC summit Jeddah (Apr 28) positive; May 1 War Powers deadline; tail risk 45%. PTTEP EBITDA strong at $111 Brent - execute USD H2 prefunding now while credit windows remain open. Gulf JV sanctions-compliance review urgent.

iTraxx Asia IG ~200bp (-2bp Apr 29 est.); USD/SGD ~1.2920 est. (-0.04%); Brent confirmed $111.16 Apr 28. GCC summit Jeddah (Apr 28) marginal spread relief; May 1 War Powers deadline adds political risk. Maintain full USD hedging; revolving-credit expansion window narrowing. Tail (45%) targets spreads 230bp+; execute revolving-credit expansion without delay.

ASEAN HY ~588bp (-2bp Apr 29 est.); Brent confirmed $111.16 Apr 28. GCC summit Jeddah (Apr 28) marginal positive; May 1 War Powers deadline adds uncertainty. Nuclear stalemate persists - Hyflux desalination power cost trajectory remains elevated. Advance private-credit and quasi-sovereign restructuring terms. Tail (45%) pushes ASEAN HY to 620-650bp.
